name.jp: マックス☆ハートキャッチ

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52207_1]</color> chance to increase the <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> of all allies by <color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52207_1]</color>.\nDamage dealt increases proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color>.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52207_1]</color> 확률로 아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52207_1]</color> 회복합니다.\n이 스킬은 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>이 높을수록 피해가 증가합니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52207_1]</color>の確率で味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>が<color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52207_1]</color>UPする。\nこのスキルは、自分の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>が高いほどダメージがUPする。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52207_1]</color>的几率使全体友军的<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>恢复<color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52207_1]</color>。\n自身<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>越高,则该技能的伤害越高。

description.en: Grants increased <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> to all allies for <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52208_0] turn(s)</color> and grants increased <color=#28d9ed>Counterattack</color> to the caster for <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52208_1] turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52208_0]턴</color> 동안 증가시키고, 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>반격</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52208_1]턴</color> 동안 증가시킵니다.
description.jp: 味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52208_0]</color>ターンの間UPさせ、自分の<color=#28d9ed>反撃</color>を<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52208_1]ターン</color>の間UPさせる。
description.zh: 使全体友军的<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52208_0]回合</color>,并使自身的<color=#28d9ed>反击</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52208_1]回合</color>。

name.jp: キラキラ☆トゥインクル

description.en: Attacks all enemies.\n Has a <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52209_0]</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Taunted</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52209_0] turn(s)</color>, and grants <color=#28d9ed>Immunity</color> to the caster for <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52209_1] turn(s)</color>.\nDamage dealt increases proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color>.
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격합니다.\n<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52209_0]</color> 확률로 대상을 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52209_0]턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>도발</color>하고, 자신은 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52209_1]턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>면역</color>을 얻습니다.\n이 스킬은 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>이 높을수록 피해가 증가합니다.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与える。\n<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52209_0]</color>の確率で対象を<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52209_0]ターン</color>の間<color=#28d9ed>挑発</color>し、自分に<color=#28d9ed>免疫</color>を<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52209_1]ターン</color>の間付与する。\nこのスキルは自分の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>が高いほどダメージがUPする。
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人。\n有<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52209_0]</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>挑衅</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52209_0]回合</color>,并使自身获得<color=#28d9ed>免疫</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52209_1]回合</color>。\n自身<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>越高,则该技能的伤害越高。

name.jp: エンジェリックエンブレイス

description.en:
(Passive Effect)
After <color=#28d9ed>counterattacking</color>, recovers Priority of all allies by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>.

Increases <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> proportional to missing Health. Defense can increase up to 160%.
description.kr:
(패시브 효과)
<color=#28d9ed>반격</color> 이후 아군 전체의 행동 게이지를 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> 회복시킵니다.

체력이 감소할수록 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>이 증가합니다. 방어력은 최대 160% 증가합니다.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n反撃後、味方全体の行動ゲージが<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>UPする。\n<color=#28d9ed>残りHPが低いほど</color>防御力がUPする。<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>は最大160%UPする。
description.zh:
(被动效果)
<color=#28d9ed>反击</color>后,使全体友军的行动值恢复<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>。

生命值越低,<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>越高。防御力最多提升
160%。

description.en:
<color=#28d9ed>Penetration</color> is always increased by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Critical Hit Chance</color> by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>.
At end of turn, restores your HP by <color=#28d9ed>5%</color>.

At end of turn, reduces the enemy team's CP by <color=#28d9ed>25</color>.
description.kr:
항상 관통력이 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>, 치명 확률이 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 증가합니다

턴 시작 시 자신의 체력을 <color=#28d9ed>5%</color>회복합니다.
턴 종료 시 적 팀의 CP를 <color=#28d9ed>25</color> 감소시킵니다.
description.jp:
常時、<color=#28d9ed>貫通力</color>が<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>、<color=#28d9ed>会心率</color>が<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>上昇する。
ターン終了時、自分のHPを<color=#28d9ed>5%</color>回復する。

ターン終了時、敵チームのCPを<color=#28d9ed>25</color>減少させる。
description.zh:
<color=#28d9ed>穿透</color>始终+<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>,<color=#28d9ed>暴击率</color>+<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>。
回合结束时,回复自身生命值<color=#28d9ed>5%</color>。

回合结束时,降低敌方队伍CP<color=#28d9ed>25</color>。
